subcodes.title: Words to Mrs Parsons, spoken on 1912-04-28
subcodes.first_line: This was the springtime; we had good meetings at your home... This material world has an outer appearance. It has also a hidden aspect.
subcodes.first_line_orig: فصل بهار بود و در منزل شما مجامع خوبی داشتیم من هیچوقت فراموش
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @interconnectedness; all things involved in all things; chain of being, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @material and spiritual existence; two books
